steps.title: Factor the expression
steps.content: The GCF of $24$ and $30$ is $6$. Factor it out:$$24x+30=6(4x+5)$$

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content: The factored form is $6(4x+5)$. That matches choice D — D is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice D, $6(4x + 5)$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so D is correct.
